hero.title: Wholesale elegance, made simple.
hero.subtitle: We curate on-trend collections for discerning retailers. One source, many choices, fast delivery.

items.title: One source
items.body: A single European partner for your full seasonal lineup.

story.title: Careful curation, from maker to retail.
story.body: HUANG'S is operated by Lua Cintilante Unipessoal Lda. We visit ateliers, select fabrics, and oversee every collection before it reaches your floor.

shopCta.title: Ready to order?
shopCta.body: Head to our online store for live stock, pricing, and wholesale terms.

about.title: About us
about.subtitle: Fashion that travels with intent.
about.body: We believe wholesale fashion can be handled with the same discipline as an atelier: honest materials, careful construction, and short lead times. HUANG'S was born from that conviction.

items.title: Curated wholesale selection
items.body: We focus on practical women's fashion ranges that retailers can buy, restock, and combine across seasons.

items.title: Stock clarity
items.body: Collections are presented with direct access to the Microstore, keeping product availability and buying decisions close together.

items.title: Direct communication
items.body: Wholesale questions, account setup, and pickup details are handled through direct contact with the team.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Wholesale enquiries, partnerships, or showroom visits.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

wholesale.title: How we work
wholesale.subtitle: A clear five-step process, shaped by two decades of serving European boutiques.

steps.title: Enquiry
steps.body: Send a short message with your shop, the categories you carry, and the markets you serve. We reply within one business day.

steps.title: Onboarding
steps.body: We open a wholesale account, verify your business registration, and share access to the live Microstore.

steps.title: Microstore access
steps.body: Browse live stock, wholesale pricing, and weekly drops on the online store — no commitment to explore.

steps.title: Order
steps.body: Place your order online or with your account manager. Mix sizes and colors freely across styles.

steps.title: Fulfilment
steps.body: Dispatch within 24–72 hours from our Porto warehouse. Tracked delivery across the EU.

groups.title: In store
items: Provide the name or number linked to your account

groups.title: Online
items: Live prices available in the app
Missed collections forfeit online reservation rights

cta.title: Ready to open an account?
cta.body: Tell us a little about your shop and we'll send over everything you need to start ordering.
